overall.description: Gameplay footage from a video game (GTA IV) showing a character walking along a wooden pier toward the Statue of Liberty, then standing at the pier's end while the camera pans to reveal the surrounding city skyline and harbor. The scene transitions from focusing on the statue to showcasing the urban waterfront architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier extending into harbor toward statue

events.description: character stops walking and stands still at the end of the pier facing the statue

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden pier toward the Statue of Liberty, then stopping at the pier's end to face the monument

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the pier surface with metal railings on sides
large green copper statue on pedestal located on an island in the harbor
calm blue-green water surrounding the pier and island
long suspension bridge visible on the horizon across the water
metal bollard for securing boats mounted on the pier edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden pier extending into a calm harbor, approaching the Statue of Liberty visible in the distance. The scene is open and exposed with clear skies, and the character stops at the pier's end to face the monument.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier end with panoramic harbor and city skyline views

events.description: camera begins panning right around the stationary character to reveal the cityscape
screen gradually fades to black marking the end of the clip

agents.ego_description: standing still at the pier's end while the camera rotates around to showcase the surrounding city skyline and harbor views

entered.detail: dense cluster of skyscrapers and high-rise buildings forming the urban skyline
tall contemporary office buildings with reflective glass facades
ornate early 20th century skyscraper with distinctive green尖顶 tower
commercial buildings lining the waterfront promenade

segments.scene_description: Standing at the pier's end, the camera pans right to reveal a panoramic view of the city skyline featuring modern glass towers and historic skyscrapers along the waterfront. The Statue of Liberty moves out of frame to the left as the urban architecture comes into view, and the clip fades to black.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a focused approach toward a distant monument and expands into a wide panoramic view of a coastal city. It begins with a character walking along a wooden pier extending into a calm harbor, moving steadily toward the Statue of Liberty under clear skies. As the character reaches the end of the pier and comes to a halt, the camera begins a smooth pan to the right. The Statue of Liberty gradually slides out of frame to the left as the scene opens up to reveal a sprawling skyline of modern glass towers and historic skyscrapers lining the waterfront. The shot finally lingers on this urban architectural vista before fading to black.
